title: pkcs11: integration_sign doesn't verify signature
description: Trigger: any test run with SECRETX_PKCS11_TEST=1. Test proves HSM returned bytes but not that they form a valid signature over the test message — public key is never fetched and verify never runs. A misconfigured slot returning garbage would pass. Same deficiency that was just fixed for aws-kms (xyx.7). Fix: fetch public key DER, detect algorithm(), and verify with p256::ecdsa or rsa::pss verifier, mirroring secretx-aws-kms/src/lib.rs:403-410.
